ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of product (e.g., Bag, Bulk) */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "production_cost" TEXT /* The cost to produce one unit of the product */,
  "retail_price" TEXT /* The retail price of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the product was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factories" (
  "factory_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each factory */,
  "factory_name" TEXT /* Name of the factory */,
  "province_id" INTEGER /* ID of the province where the factory is located */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the factory */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the factory */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the factory */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum production capacity of the factory */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the factory (e.g., 'Operational', 'Maintenance', 'Closed') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the factory record was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the factory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factories_province_id FOREIGN KEY ("province_id") REFERENCES provinces ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region to which the province belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the province */,
  "area" INTEGER /* Area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the province record was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the province record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production record */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being produced */,
  "factory_id" TEXT /* ID of the factory where the product is being produced */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of production */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of production */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of product produced */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the production batch */,
  "quality_check_status" TEXT /* Status of the quality check for the batch (e.g., 'Passed', 'Failed') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the production record was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the production record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_factory_id FOREIGN KEY ("factory_id") REFERENCES factories ("factory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "factory_id" TEXT /* ID of the factory where the product is being sold */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of sales */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of sales */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of product sold */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., 'Retail', 'Wholesale', 'Online') */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue from the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the sales record was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time when the sales record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_factory_id FOREIGN KEY ("factory_id") REFERENCES factories ("factory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
